text: Amazon Kendra @ mosesncaio. @ s ¢ Index - searchable data organised in an efficient way e Data Source - Where your data lives, Kendra connects and indexes from this location ¢ S3, Confluence, Google Workspace, RDS, OneDrive, Salesforce, Kendra Web Crawler, Workdocs, FSX... ¢ Synchronise with index based on a schedule e Documents - Structured (FAQs), Unstructured (e.g HTML, PDFs, text .....) e Integrates with AWS Services (IAM, Identity Center (SSO), ...)
